source.title: PDD Holdings Q3 2025 Earnings + SEC EDGAR XBRL + Quarterly Earnings Releases

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings R&D spending accelerated sharply in 2025, reaching 41% YoY growth in Q3 2025

verification.verifier_notes: Each quarter's R&D figure cross-referenced against PDD's official earnings press releases on investor.pddholdings.com. Prior-year comparisons extracted from YoY disclosure in each quarter's release.

extractions.claim: PDD's R&D acceleration is driven by increased staff costs and infrastructure (bandwidth/server) costs, indicating platform technology buildout
extractions.evidence: Q3 2025 earnings release: 'Research and development expenses were RMB4,332.2 million (US$608.5 million), an increase of 41% from RMB3,063.4 million in the same quarter of 2024, primarily due to increased staff-related costs, and bandwidth and server costs.'

verification.verifier_notes: Direct quote from PDD Q3 2025 earnings release

extractions.claim: PDD's operating expenses surged 37% in Q1 2025 as company entered investment phase
extractions.evidence: Q1 2025 earnings: total operating expenses rose 37% YoY. Management stated company will 'continue to invest in R&D in the long run to capture opportunities in supply chain innovation and consumer experience.'

verification.verifier_notes: From Q1 2025 earnings call and press release

extractions.claim: PDD's Q3 2025 sales and marketing expenses held flat at RMB 30.3B despite revenue growth, signaling strategic reallocation from US marketing to R&D and merchant subsidies
extractions.evidence: Q3 2025: Sales & marketing expenses RMB 30.32B ($4.26B), down from RMB 30.48B YoY. Revenue grew 9% to RMB 108.3B. S&M as % of revenue declined from ~31% to ~28%.

verification.verifier_notes: Computed from Q3 2025 earnings press release figures

extractions.claim: PDD annual revenue from EDGAR XBRL: FY2022 $18.9B, FY2023 $34.9B, FY2024 $54.0B — 55% CAGR over two years

verification.verifier_notes: Extracted directly from SEC EDGAR XBRL CompanyFacts API for CIK 0001737806

extractions.claim: PDD employee headcount grew 35% in 2024 to 23,465, following 34% growth in 2023
extractions.evidence: Employee count from 20-F filings: 2022: 12,992 | 2023: 17,403 (+34%) | 2024: 23,465 (+35%). Primarily R&D and operations staff growth.

verification.verifier_notes: From PDD 20-F annual reports filed with SEC. FY2024 20-F filed April 28, 2025.
